headline: Advanced Sterilization Products (ASP) Acquires a Majority Stake in UV Smart
summary: IRVINE, Calif., June 24, 2026--Advanced Sterilization Products (ASP), part of the Infection Prevention group of companies within Fortive (NYSE: FTV), announced today it has acquired a majority share of UV Smart, a leader in High Level Disinfection technology in Europe.
